emails.subject: Iroquois Parking Dispute
emails.body: Iroquois Parking Dispute Chris, We paid parking fees to Iroquois for 9905 and 9906 production months: May 1999 $1,934.42 included in a wire on 6/18/99 for $1,498,033.81. June 1999 $1,872.02 included in a wire on 7/22/99 for $1,393,799.19. Total $3,806.44 If you have any additional questions, please let me know. Thanks, Chris
